name: AREthOutputMessage
title: AREthOutputMessage
syntax: long AREthOutputMessage( dword aepHandle, dword remoteIPv4Address, dword remotePort, dword messageHandle ); // form 1
long AREthOutputMessage( dword aepHandle, IP_Endpoint remoteIPEndpoint, dword messageHandle); // form 2
description: This function is used to send a SOME/IP message.

The packet is sent immediately. All messages that were prepared for sending beforehand with AREthPostMessage are inserted in the packet to be sent and sent with the message, provided that the buffered messages have the same source and the same destination.

parameters.name: aepHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the local Application Endpoint over which the message should be output.

parameters.name: remoteIPv4Address
parameters.description: IPv4 address to which the message should be sent (Network Byte Order).

parameters.name: remotePort
parameters.description: UDP/TCP port number to which the message should be sent.

parameters.name: remoteIPEndpoint
parameters.description: Object of type IP_Endpoint that contains the address/port of the remote endpoint.

parameters.name: messageHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the message that was created with AREthCreateMessage, for example.

return: IPv4 address to which the message should be
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
